title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Hilton Brand Management Co., Ltd
body: "Application number 5393  Applicant Hilton Worldwide Manage Limited objected to the name used by Hilton Brand Management Co., Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 16 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Hilton Brand Management Co., Ltd is changed to 15938361, Ltd. "
